en: No, we could use a little worse.
ko: 아니, 좀 더 심한 게 필요할 수도 있지.

en: Stark, we got him. Just like you said.
Then tell him to suit up. I'm bringing the party to you.
ko: 그럼 장비 갖추라고 해. 파티를 가져갈게.

en: I don't see how that's a party.
Dr. Banner. Now might be a really good time for you to get angry.
ko: 배너 박사님. 지금 화낼 때인 것 같은데요.

en: That's my secret, Captain. I'm always angry.
ko: 그게 내 비밀이야, 캡틴. 난 항상 화나 있거든.
